meta.name: ABILITY_PROPELL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Dash forward one tile and attack.
Dash forward one tile and attack, twice!

meta.name: ABILITY_HADOKEN_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot an energy blast in a straight line.
Shoot a high damage energy blast in a straight line.

meta.name: ABILITY_CARTWHEEL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Roll up to 4 tiles diagonally.
Roll up to 4 tiles diagonally or in a straight line.

meta.name: ABILITY_STONEFISTS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain [img:str] and [img:dex] equal to your [img:shield] until the end of your turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_STONEFISTS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Convert your [img:shield] to [img:str] and [img:dex] for the rest of the battle.

meta.name: ABILITY_TRANSCEND_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Cleanse your debuffs and gain +1 [img:shield].
Cleanse your debuffs and gain +1 [img:shield]. At the end of each round, automatically cast this spell for free.

meta.name: ABILITY_HIPTOSS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Throw a random adjacent unit two tiles away, dealing damage to it.
Throw a random adjacent unit two tiles away, dealing damage to it. This deals double damage if it's thrown onto another unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_BRUISE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack inflicts Bruise until the end of the turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
Your basic attack inflicts Bruise until the end of the turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_SLAPBACK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
A melee attack with a high critical hit chance.
RELOAD: Take damage.

A melee attack with a 100% critical hit chance.
RELOAD: Take damage.

meta.name: ABILITY_FINISHER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Dash forward three tiles and attack. This deals 2 damage for each action you've taken this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Dash forward three tiles and attack. This deals 2 damage for each action you've taken this turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per turn.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_REVERBERATE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Gain +8 [img:shield] and knock back adjacent units two tiles. This spell costs 3 mana less for each action you've taken this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Gain +8 [img:shield] and knock back adjacent units two tiles. This spell costs 3 mana less and grants 1 extra [img:shield] for each action you've taken this turn.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_COMBOTHROW_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A melee attack with Knockback 3. When this hits, switch into ranged stance and refresh your basic attack.

A melee attack with Knockback 3. When this hits, switch into ranged stance and refresh your basic attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_COMBOPULL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: A ranged attack that pulls the unit it hits toward you. When this hits, switch into melee stance and refresh your basic attack.

A ranged attack that pulls the unit it hits toward you. When this hits, switch into melee stance and refresh your basic attack.

meta.name: ABILITY_ONEWITHTHEWIND_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +20 Movement Range until the end of the turn.
Gain +20 Movement Range until the end of the turn and refresh your movement action.

meta.name: ABILITY_POGO_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Jump to a tile. Bounce off any unit you land on, damaging that unit.
Jump to a tile. Bounce off any unit you land on, damaging and Bruising that unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_WAYOFTHEMANTIS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.

For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_PORCUPINE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until your next turn.
Gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until your next turn. Also reflect the next projectile you're hit by.

meta.name: ABILITY_ANNEAL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +1 [img:shield]. This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_ANNEAL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +1 [img:shield]. This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn, and after each time you spend mana on another spell.

meta.name: ABILITY_DEEPDIVE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Become downed. You don't get injured. At the end of the next round, you're revived with 1 HP, 15 [img:shield], and All Stats Up.
Become downed. You don't get injured. At the end of the next round, you're revived with 50% HP, 20 [img:shield], 2 [img:divineshield], and All Stats Up 2.

meta.name: ABILITY_HOPNBLOCK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Jump to a tile, then gain +2 [img:shield] for each enemy adjacent to the tile you land on.
Jump to any tile, then gain +2 [img:shield] for each enemy adjacent to the tile you land on.

meta.name: ABILITY_WAYOFTHEOWL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: For the rest of the battle, the first spell you cast each turn is cast twice.

For the rest of the battle, the first spell you cast each turn is cast twice.

meta.desc_resolved: Heal yourself for 8 HP and gain +8 Shield, All Stats Up 2, and Sleep 8.

meta.desc_resolved:
Heal yourself for 8 HP and gain +8 Shield, All Stats Up 2, and Drowsy 8.

meta.name: ABILITY_DOOMPUNCH_NAME

meta.desc_resolved: A melee attack that causes a unit to die at the end of its next turn. Bosses fall asleep at the end of their next turn instead.

meta.desc_resolved: Gain +1 temporary Kinetic Spikes.
Gain +2 temporary Kinetic Spikes.

Gain +1 Brace.

meta.name: ABILITY_QUICKATTACK_NAME

Teleport, then use your basic attack on an enemy within range. This spell's range is increased by 2 for each empty armor slot you have.

meta.name: ABILITY_PERFECTFORM_NAME

meta.name: ABILITY_FLYINGFIST_NAME

meta.name: ABILITY_CHARGESPIRITBOMB_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Begin charging a spirit bomb. This ability becomes Throw Spirit Bomb.
Allies gain the bonus ability Donate Energy until you throw it.

Allies gain the bonus ability Donate Energy+ until you throw it.

meta.desc_resolved:
Throw the Spirit Bomb, then this ability becomes Charge Spirit Bomb.
[s:.7](Cannot be thrown with 0 charges.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_DONATEENERGY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give +1 damage to the Spirit Bomb!
Give +2 damage to the Spirit Bomb!

meta.name: ABILITY_ONEPUNCH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
A one-hit kill punch. Gain All Stats Down on use.
This deals 25 damage to bosses instead of killing them.

A one-hit kill punch. It causes a cone of wind that deals 5 damage. Gain All Stats Down on use.

meta.name: ABILITY_UNBRIDLEDHITS_NAME

meta.name: ABILITY_KAMEHAMEHA_NAME

Fire a magic blast at a unit within 5 tiles. Requires line of sight.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle. If all your armor slots are empty, castable once per turn.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_SIDESTEP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Move one tile and gain +1 [img:shield].

Move one tile and gain +1 [img:shield].

meta.name: ABILITY_UNIMPEDEDLUNGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Dash forward X spaces, gain +X [img:shield], deal X damage, and deal X knockback.
X is equal to the number of empty armor slots you have plus one.

Dash forward X spaces, gain +X [img:shield], deal X damage, and deal X knockback.
X is equal to twice the number of empty armor slots you have.

meta.name: ABILITY_DOUBLEDRAGON_NAME

Summon a 1 HP illusion of yourself on any tile that mimics your basic attack, but in the opposite direction of you. It dies at the end of your turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_FISTOFFATE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it.
Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it. This has a chance to repeat multiple times.

meta.name: ABILITY_NIRVANA_NAME

Gain +1 [img:int] and +1 [img:shield].
If you have 7 or more [img:shield], this spell costs 1 mana less.

If you have 7 or more [img:shield], this spell costs 1 mana less.

meta.name: ABILITY_EMPTYMIND_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
You can't cast spells for the rest of the battle.
For the rest of the battle, whenever you kill an enemy, take an extra turn.

You can't cast spells for the rest of the battle.
For the rest of the battle, whenever you kill an enemy, take an extra turn.
Get an extra turn when you cast this.

meta.name: ABILITY_POSITION_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport exactly two tiles away, then switch stances.
Teleport two to four tiles away, then switch stances.

meta.name: ABILITY_CHARGEFISTS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Until end of turn, your basic attack emits +1 Sparkle.

Until end of turn, your basic attack emits +1 Sparkle.
Refresh your basic attack.

meta.name: ABILITY_SUMMONAPPRENTICE_NAME
